code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have_max = false
mut max_val = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let num = sign * val
      if num > 0
        if not have_max or num > max_val
          max_val = num
          have_max = true
        end
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
  else
    if not in_num and b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if not in_num and b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let num = sign * val
  if num > 0
    if not have_max or num > max_val
      max_val = num
      have_max = true
    end
  end
end

if have_max
  println("max=#{max_val}")
else
  println("none")
end
